description:
Create a new vaccination record in GNU Health for patient Ana Betz, documenting her second dose of Hepatitis B vaccine received as part of a workplace immunization program.

Login credentials:
- URL: http://localhost:8000/
- Database: health50
- Username: admin
- Password: gnusolidario

Required details for the new record:
- Patient: Ana Betz
- Vaccine: Hepatitis B Vaccine
- Date: 2025-01-15
- Dose Number: 2
- Observations: "Dose 2 of 3. Lot: HBV-2025-0342. Occupational health requirement per workplace immunization program."
